Description: The center-to-center separation of the fixed and movable groups
The gap beyond the van der Waals contact distance (negative is overlap)
The index of the random relative orientation this configuration belongs to
The polar angle of the fixed-to-movable displacement vector
The azimuthal angle of the fixed-to-movable displacement vector
The first ZYZ Euler angle of the movable group relative to its principal axes
The second ZYZ Euler angle of the movable group relative to its principal axes
The third ZYZ Euler angle of the movable group relative to its principal axes
The surrogate interaction energy ΔE = E_AB − E_A − E_B at this separation (energy-stratified spacing)
The depth −min(ΔE) of the orientation's interaction-energy well (energy-stratified spacing)
